note.zh: 在 Reasonix 编程代理环境中一次生成。使用 Three.js (CDN) 构建了完整的 3D 镂空机械表，包含摆轮、游丝、擒纵机构、齿轮系、发条盒、红宝石轴承、夹板等全部可见机芯结构，支持 OrbitControls 旋转、爆炸视图、CSS2D 零件标签和交互信息面板。一次生成，无人工修复。
note.en: Generated in one shot in the Reasonix coding agent environment. Built a complete interactive 3D skeleton mechanical watch with Three.js (CDN), including balance wheel, hairspring, escapement, gear train, mainspring barrel, ruby jewels, bridges and all visible movement components. Features OrbitControls rotation, exploded view, CSS2D part labels, and interactive info panel. One-shot generation, no manual fixes.
